title: Kind’s Crystal Optimizer
description: Kind Crystal Optimizer reduces delay when placing and breaking end crystals by handling them client side, making actions feel instant and eliminating lag.
body:
Kind’s Crystal Optimizer

Faster and more responsive crystal gameplay

--- ## Overview Kind’s Crystal Optimizer is a client-side performance mod that reduces perceived delay when placing and breaking end crystals. By handling crystal actions instantly on the client—hiding them and rendering them immediately it delivers smoother, faster, and more consistent interactions, even in high-latency environments. --- ## Features - Instant crystal rendering - Reduced placement and break delay - Qicker crystal entity rendering - Faster crystal interactions - Improved consistency in PvP - Better performance on high ping ---

Performance Comparison (70ms)

slowed down to show more detail | With Mod | Without Mod | |----------|------------| | ![With Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/weAHXUvw/images/9446d8d02642e5c49195372d02bc28b2b7d84ac6.gif) | ![Without Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/weAHXUvw/images/ea8b9886230c8ce5970ba67069cf168d873765ee.gif) |
